parameter.name: IMSDBConnectionString-Web.config Connection String
parameter.description: IMSDBConnectionString Connection String used in web.config by the application to access the database.
parameter.defaultValue: Data source=.;initial catalog=IMS-DB; Integrated Security=SSPI; MultipleActiveResultSets=True; Persist Security Info=True; Connection Timeout=300;

parameter.name: IMSAccConnectionString-Web.config Connection String
parameter.description: IMSAccConnectionString Connection String used in web.config by the application to access the database.
parameter.defaultValue: Data Source=.; Initial Catalog=IMS-DB; Integrated Security=SSPI; MultipleActiveResultSets=True; Persist Security Info=True; Connection Timeout=300;

parameter.name: CIMSDBConnectionString-Web.config Connection String
parameter.description: CIMSDBConnectionString Connection String used in web.config by the application to access the database.
parameter.defaultValue: Data source=.; initial catalog=IMS-DB; Integrated Security=SSPI; MultipleActiveResultSets=True; Persist Security Info=True; Connection Timeout=300;

parameter.name: AttachConString-Web.config Connection String
parameter.description: AttachConString Connection String used in web.config by the application to access the database.
parameter.defaultValue: Data Source=.;Initial Catalog=AttachDB;Integrated Security =SSPI;MultipleActiveResultSets=True; Connection Timeout=300;

parameter.name: IMS-DBConnectionString-Web.config Connection String
parameter.description: IMS-DBConnectionString Connection String used in web.config by the application to access the database.
parameter.defaultValue: Data Source=.;Initial Catalog=IMS-DB;Integrated Security=True;Persist Security Info=True;MultipleActiveResultSets=True; Connection Timeout=300;

parameter.name: AttachDBConnectionString-Web.config Connection String
parameter.description: AttachDBConnectionString Connection String used in web.config by the application to access the database.

parameter.name: AttachDB-Web.config Connection String
parameter.description: AttachDB Connection String used in web.config by the application to access the database.
parameter.defaultValue: Data Source=.;Initial Catalog=AttachDB;Integrated Security = SSPI;MultipleActiveResultSets=True; Connection Timeout=300;
